_comment: NPC: Zhang Tian (张天). Heng Yue Sect outer sect elder — annual aptitude recruiter for Zhao Country. Canon ID: N-REC-001 (derived). Per PROJECT_MASTER.md §5.3: this NPC triggers the Day 3 ceremony. He is NOT a combat entity — he arrives, tests children, accepts them, and departs.
name: Zhang Tian
personality: impassive, dutiful, slightly weary from years of recruitment

perception_tiers.mortal: A stern man in blue robes who descended from the sky
perception_tiers.qi_condensation: Heng Yue Sect outer elder, Foundation Establishment realm

note: Annual recruiter. Appears at Wang Family Village on Day 3. Triggers aptitude test ceremony (AptitudeTestEvent.java). Per §5.4: the player can also find him on the road for an early ceremony trigger.

dao_heart.note: Stable but unremarkable. He does his duty.
